verdicts.title: render_adapter_generator/ (~1,443 LOC) has no production consumer
verdicts.note: RenderAdapterGenerator is never instantiated in prod; only __init__ re-export, tests, and a comment at runtime_api/schemas/common.py:181; ADAPTER_GENERATED is emitted only inside the dead package (render_adapter_generator/capability.py:216).

verdicts.title: Dynamic tool-loading subsystem (registry/loader/load_tool/runtime_gate) has zero production consumers
verdicts.note: DynamicToolRegistry/ToolLoader/LoadToolSpecTool/ToolUsePolicyGate referenced only within tools/ package + __init__ re-exports; display_for defined only on registry.py:96 while the live worker stack roots at WebSearchToolRegistry (dependencies.py:41), so handlers/run.py:784 getattr probe never hits it.

verdicts.title: In-process AST-gated code_sandbox + code_tool_adapter are dead, superseded by interpreter/ and sandbox/
verdicts.note: InProcessCodeSandbox/CodeToolAdapter have no consumer outside their own package (code_tool_adapter.py:29 self-imports code_sandbox); the services/backend 'code_sandbox_not_yet_wired' hits are an unrelated error string in a different service.

verdicts.title: mcp/files.py (459 LOC) file-based MCP config + secret scanner never used in production
verdicts.note: McpFileLayout/FileMcpConfigStore/FileMcpServerProvider/SecretShapeScanner reached only by mcp/__init__.py:40-47 re-exports and tests/mcp/test_files.py; no other consumer.

verdicts.title: MCP dispatcher re-implements citation ordinal-hint block inline; cite_mcp.py is a pass-through alias
verdicts.note: call_tool.py:160-205 duplicates citation_capturing_tool.py:143-181 (same allocator lookup, skip-warning shapes, _CitationHint.append_to, hint_appended/hint_raised logs) and imports private _CitationHint at call_tool.py:13; cite_mcp.py:8-25 is a pure forward to CitationProjector.project.

verdicts.title: BackendMcpServiceAuth.headers and BackendSkillServiceAuth.headers are byte-identical
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted per protocol; both ENTERPRISE_SERVICE_TOKEN header builders at mcp/backend_provider.py:427 and skills/virtual.py:215.

verdicts.title: Token estimator implemented twice with same 4-chars/token, 100k-cap constants
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted per protocol; tool_budget_guard.py:162 _Estimator vs runtime_worker/capability_tool_wiring.py:72 _estimate_input_tokens.

verdicts.title: Four near-identical BaseTool wrappers + three registry decorators; composition order only in worker prose
verdicts.note: ToolBudgetGuardedTool/ToolErrorPolicyTool/CitationCapturingTool/RetryingTool each re-implement _run/_arun propagating name/description/args_schema, and the three registries re-implement list_available_tools+_wrap; order lives only at runtime_worker/dependencies.py:129-131 with a 5th structurally-different wrap in display_metadata.py:516.

verdicts.title: agent_runtime (pure domain) imports runtime_api.schemas at runtime — inverted dependency
verdicts.note: Runtime imports of runtime_api.schemas in tool_budget_guard.py:25, citations.py:22, backends/draft_backend.py:32, render_adapter_generator/capability.py:23, plus late import at citation_resolver.py:108 whose comment admits dodging a circular import, against services/ai-backend/CLAUDE.md:7 'agent_runtime/ — pure domain'.

verdicts.title: Three independent interrupt-resume decision parsers with diverging vocabularies
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted per protocol; auth_mcp.py:116, interpreter/policy_invoker.py:259, tools/builtin/ask_a_question.py:154.

verdicts.title: Two parallel citation token systems ([cN] ledger vs [[N]] ordinals) across five modules
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted per protocol; citations.py, citation_capturing_tool.py, citation_resolver.py, conversation_ordinals.py.

verdicts.title: CapabilityAuthGate restates McpAuthState enum value as a string literal
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted per protocol; auth_gate.py:70-72,114 AUTHENTICATED_AUTH_STATE='authenticated' vs mcp/cards.py:62 McpAuthState.

verdicts.title: CallMcpTool final handler swallows every exception with no logging
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted per protocol; mcp/middleware/call_tool.py:123 except (McpClientError, Exception) vs loader.py:212-217 which logs with exc_info.
